_note: WHYPE (Wrapped HYPE, HyperEVM chain 999) is a WETH9 fork. deposit() wraps native HYPE -> WHYPE; the wrapped amount is msg.value. There is NO wrap/unwrap TokenAction variant in the ActionBody model (token actions are approve/permit/transfer/nft_*/permit2_*/revoke), so mapping to a token action would mislabel. -> Unknown, which preserves the raw deposit() call + the HYPE value being wrapped (calldata = $calldata, value = $tx.value). CAVEAT: the WHYPE full 40-hex address is D9-limited; docs give only 0x5555...5, so the all-5s pattern 0x5555555555555555555555555555555555555555 is ASSUMED (not 1차-verified). If the real address differs the chain-999 callkey is wrong, but the body mapping is unaffected.
